method: Faceted box plots with x-axis=churn_category, y-axis=metric values (split into 3 columns for each score). Encoding includes boxplot quartiles, outliers, and median lines. Interactive tooltips show statistical summaries.
objective: Compare distribution patterns of key metrics across churn categories to identify risk profiles

method: Grouped bar charts with x-axis=service bundle (e.g., 'Fiber Optic + Streaming'), y-axis=churn_rate%. Color encoding for service combinations. Layered line chart shows overall trend.
objective: Identify high-risk service bundles contributing to churn

method: Scatterplot matrix with regression lines. Brushing in any plot highlights corresponding data points across all dimensions. Color encodes churn_label.
objective: Reveal nonlinear relationships between predictive metrics and churn status

method: Proportional stacked bar charts with x-axis=demographic groups (age bins/gender), y-axis=percentage distribution. Small multiples show dependents count stratification.
objective: Identify demographic patterns in churn behavior

method: Vertical grouped bar charts with x-axis=internet_type, grouped bars for streaming service combinations (Yes/No). Red-yellow color scale encodes churn rate intensity.
objective: Analyze how internet infrastructure and media consumption affect attrition

method: Linked bar-pie visualization: Bar chart (x=offer type, y=redemption count) drives pie chart showing churn reasons proportion. Brushing highlights contractual patterns.
objective: Evaluate promotional effectiveness and failure causes
